subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P2] Run verification gate for Phase 2
description:
Run the full verification suite to confirm Phase 2 (DB schema changes and Damon) is complete.

## Commands

```bash
pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test -- --run
```

All three must pass.

## Manual verification

1. Start the dev server (`pnpm dev`) and confirm:
   - Damon appears in the agent list
   - Damon has the "system" namespace
   - Damon cannot be deleted from the UI or API
2. Confirm no existing schedules remain (alpha clean slate)
3. Confirm the `pulse_schedules` table schema includes `file_path` and `tags_json` columns

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
- `pnpm build` succeeds
- `pnpm test -- --run` passes
- Damon is registered on startup
- DB schema has the new columns
